expectations.evidence: Title reads 'ANC Contact Note — Contact 6'. Gestational age stated as '36 weeks'. Visit Type is 'Scheduled ANC Contact 6'.

Fetal Assessment table includes 'Fetal presentation: Cephalic (confirmed by abdominal palpation)'. Section 6 plan notes 'Fetal presentation: Cephalic at 36 weeks — favorable. Re-assess at next contact'.

expectations.text: Birth preparedness and complication readiness counseled
expectations.evidence: Section 5.1 'Birth Preparedness and Complication Readiness' covers delivery facility, transport plan, birth companion, packed bag, emergency savings, and emergency contacts.

Section 5.3 'Breastfeeding Counseling' discusses early initiation within one hour of birth, exclusive breastfeeding for 6 months, positioning and attachment techniques, and benefits for mother and infant.
Section 6 plan states 'Schedule next contact: Contact 7 at 38 weeks gestational age.' Summary confirms 'The patient is scheduled for Contact 7 at 38 weeks'.
